title: idea_select record
description: Append an idea-selection record (one per selection pass). The rich content (raw_slate + challenge + novelty_risk + selection_gate scores + rejected + retained + experiment plan) lives in the select_ref artifact (runs/<q>/idea/select-<n>.json) and is validated by `idea validate`, which enforces the rigor floor + selection-pressure rules and computes valid + gate_score. valid / gate_score are NOT settable here (additionalProperties:false); valid is force-reset to 0. The experiment-handoff idea gate reads valid — an idea may not advance to experiment without a validator-confirmed selection.

select_ref.description: loop-relative path to the typed idea-select.json artifact
